title: Need help with a formulafor
excerpt: Hi all. I’m having a formula issue and was hoping someone might have an answer. It’s not complicated but it’s better if I just post this Loom video. Thanks in advance for any help.

posts.author: Joshua07 (Joshua Johnson)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi all. I’m having a formula issue and was hoping someone might have an answer. It’s not complicated but it’s better if I just post this Loom video. Thanks in advance for any help.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
So to confirm, each project is a group right now? Is there a specific reason for that or could you just have each project be a line item and then the statuses are updated as each step happens? Which product (CRM/Work Management, etc) and level (Pro/Enterprise) do you have?

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com
